ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "initials" TEXT /* Initials of the employee */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the employee (M/F) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "email_address" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "login_name" TEXT /* Login name for the employee */,
  "employee_category" TEXT /* Category of the employee (e.g., Full-Time, Part-Time, Contractor) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee to whom this address belongs */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., Home, Work) */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the primary address for the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with this status */,
  "validity_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the employment status */,
  "validity_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the employment status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., Active, Terminated) */,
  "reason_for_status_change" TEXT /* Reason for the change in employment status */,
  "is_probationary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the employee is on probation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_status_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving this salary */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the salary amount */,
  "salary_amount" REAL /* Salary amount */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Bank account number for salary deposits */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bank where the account is held */,
  "pay_frequency" TEXT /* Pay frequency (e.g., Weekly, Bi-Weekly, Monthly) */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate for the employee */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Bonus amount */,
  "overtime_rate" REAL /* Overtime rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "banks" (
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bank */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank */,
  "bank_address" TEXT /* Address of the bank */,
  "bank_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the bank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee assigned this role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Manager, Developer) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the role belongs to */,
  "role_level" TEXT /* Level of the role (e.g., Junior, Senior, Lead) */,
  "is_manager" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role has managerial responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll" (
  "payroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll transaction */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with this payroll */,
  "pay_period_start" TEXT /* Start date of the pay period */,
  "pay_period_end" TEXT /* End date of the pay period */,
  "gross_pay" REAL /* Gross pay amount */,
  "net_pay" REAL /* Net pay amount after deductions */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax deducted */,
  "deductions" REAL /* Other deductions */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Direct Deposit, Check) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving this benefit */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., Health Insurance, Retirement) */,
  "benefit_value" REAL /* Value of the benefit */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the benefit */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the benefit */,
  "benefit_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with this access */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  "last_access_date" TEXT /* Date of the last access */,
  "access_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the access level */,
  "last_access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the last access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee whose record was changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of what change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* Who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., Update, Delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
